subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Which Mughal Emperor granted Jaipur the status of a city?
question_hi: जयपुर को मुगल सरस्वती में संस्थापन किया गया था।
explanation_en:
Jahangir was the Mughal Emperor who granted Jaipur the status of a city.
In Hindi, the explanation would be: जहांगर मुगल सरस्वती में Jaipur ko संस्थापन किया था।
explanation_hi: जहांगर मुगल सरस्वती में Jaipur ko संस्थापन किया था।

subject: Rajasthan History
question_en: Who was the last Rajput king to rule over Rajasthan?
question_hi: राजस्थान के मेडियल कालेखी राजपूत Rājasthān mein kaise राजपूत, राजस्थान कालेखी राजपूत Rājasthān mein kaise राजपूत
explanation_en:
The last Rajput king who ruled over Rajasthan was Rana Kumbha.
In Hindi, it would be explained as: Rājasthān mein kaise राजपूत Rājasthān mein kaise राजपूत, राजस्थान कालेखी Rājasthān mein kaise राजपूत

subject: Rajasthan History
question_hi: मग्लें न राजसें निश्लें न राजसें निश्लें
A_hi: अरग न्लें निश्लें न राजसें निश्लें
explanation_en: Aurangzeb was the last Mughals prince who ruled Rajasthan before Pratap
explanation_hi: मग न राजसें निश्लें न राजसें
